info.name: Audiolog
info.summary: Grave, transcreva e processe áudios com IA — direto no Nextcloud.
info.description:
**Audiolog** is a Nextcloud app to record, transcribe and process audio with AI models (Gemini, OpenAI/Whisper, Ollama).
## Features
- **In-browser recording** with pause, resume and a real-time size/duration indicator - **Auto-recovery** if the tab closes or the network drops mid-recording (IndexedDB-backed) - **Live transcription** via the browser's Web Speech API (free), Gemini Live or Google Cloud Speech-to-Text - **AI analysis**: summary, formal meeting minutes, agenda, task extraction - **Speaker diarization** in the post-stop refine pass with Gemini - **Multi-provider**: pick Gemini, OpenAI/Whisper, or Ollama (local) — no hidden cross-provider fallbacks - **Large audios** (>20 MB) supported via Gemini's Files API resumable upload - **Files integration**: recordings live under `Audiolog/`, fully manageable from the Files app - **Markdown or DOCX export** for Office/Collabora editing
## Privacy
- API keys encrypted at rest via `OCP\Security\ICrypto` - Per-group access control (`Allowed Groups` setting) - Live transcription with external API key restricted to admins by default (configurable) - Web Speech API runs entirely in the browser — no key ever leaves the server
info.author: Jhonatan Jaworski
